samples.input: When implementing secure application development practices, why is code obfuscation not relied upon as a primary security measure?
choices: It can make the codebase less maintainable and more prone to errors.
It is primarily a technique for protecting intellectual property, not for security.
It only provides a false sense of security and can be reversed by determined attackers.
It significantly slows down the application performance.

A) It can make the codebase less maintainable and more prone to errors.
B) It is primarily a technique for protecting intellectual property, not for security.
C) It only provides a false sense of security and can be reversed by determined attackers.
D) It significantly slows down the application performance.

samples.input: When implementing secure mobile solutions in a corporate environment, what is a key security measure to protect against data leakage on mobile devices?
choices: Limiting mobile device usage to senior management only.
Avoiding the use of mobile devices for any corporate activities.
Ensuring all mobile devices use the same operating system for uniformity.
Implementing Mobile Device Management (MDM) solutions to control and secure data on employee mobile devices.

samples.input: In penetration testing, what is the primary purpose of using a 'black box' approach?
choices: To test the system with no prior knowledge of the internal workings, mimicking an external attacker
To focus exclusively on physical security breaches
To simulate an attack from an internal source with full knowledge of the system
To assess the system only through available public information

samples.input: During a cybersecurity investigation, why is log analysis critical?
choices: It provides the only way to track user actions on the network.
It is a regulatory requirement in most industries.
It helps in identifying the source and scope of an incident by providing a record of system and user activities.
It simplifies the overall investigation process.

samples.input: In risk management, what is the significance of the risk treatment process?
choices: It only documents risks for legal purposes.
It involves identifying the best options for dealing with each identified risk, such as avoiding, mitigating, transferring, or accepting the risk.
It focuses on transferring all risks to insurance companies.
It ensures the complete elimination of all organizational risks.
